user.title: Hikvision ISAPI Controls
user.description: Enter your camera/NVR credentials to get started

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of your Hikvision camera/NVR (e.g., 192.168.1.12)
data_description.verify_ssl: Verify SSL certificate (uncheck for self-signed certificate)
data_description.configure_advanced: Enable this to configure advanced options like update interval and event notifications

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate {name}
reauth_confirm.description: The camera rejected the stored password (common after a factory reset). Enter the current password.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure {name}
reconfigure.description: Update connection settings for this device

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of your Hikvision camera/NVR (e.g., 192.168.1.12)
data_description.verify_ssl: Verify SSL certificate (uncheck for self-signed certificate)
data_description.password: Password for camera login (required after a factory reset)
data_description.update_interval: How often to check for updates (5-300 seconds, default: 30)
data_description.set_alarm_server: Enable this to configure the camera to send event notifications to Home Assistant
data_description.alarm_server: Home Assistant URL that the camera can reach (usually http://YOUR_HA_IP:8123)
data_description.rtsp_port_forced: Force a specific RTSP port number (1-65535). Leave empty to use camera's default port.

data_description.update_interval: How often to check for updates (5-300 seconds, default: 30)
data_description.set_alarm_server: Enable this to configure the camera to send event notifications to Home Assistant
data_description.alarm_server: Home Assistant URL that the camera can reach (usually http://YOUR_HA_IP:8123)
data_description.rtsp_port_forced: Force a specific RTSP port number (1-65535). Leave empty to use camera's default port.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid authentication - check username and password
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to camera - check IP address and network
error.timeout: Connection timeout - camera did not respond
error.host_required: IP address or hostname is required
error.alarm_server_required: Home Assistant address is required when event notifications are enabled
error.invalid_rtsp_port: RTSP port must be between 1 and 65535
